title: M Mulla Associates elevates Riddhi Dadia to Partnership
description: M Mulla Associates has announced the elevation of Riddhi Dadia to Partnership.Dadia, who has over a decade of experience, began her career at M Mulla Associates and specialises in property due diligence, title reports and drafting and negotiating documentation related to real estate transactions. She also regularly advises clients on wills, succession planning and administration of estates.On Dadia's elevation, Maneck Mulla, Managing Partner, commented, “We are delighted to welcome Riddhi t
